quests.title: Corporate Subterfuge
quests.description: Corporate espionage within the Terran Federation is reaching critical levels. Infiltrate a rival megacorp facility and extract sensitive data to destabilize their operations.

quests.title: Daily Recon Ops
quests.description: Conduct reconnaissance patrols and eliminate hostile forces threatening the sector.

quests.title: Strategic Uplink Assault
quests.description: Enemy factions have deployed uplink towers disrupting our communication network. Destroy the uplink system before reinforcements arrive.

quests.title: Cult Infiltration
quests.description: A mysterious cult has been conducting rituals near the ancient shard trees. Infiltrate their gathering and retrieve a bio-sample for study.

quests.title: Storm Belt Extermination
quests.description: A massive Aethel storm has spawned dangerous entities across the belt. Assemble a strike team and eliminate the storm guardians.

quests.title: Order Restored: The Outer Cradle
quests.description: Dengan memuncaknya anomali Prima Materia, Aethel Entity liar mulai mengancam Outer Ring. Tertibkan area tersebut demi keutuhan infrastruktur Nexus.

objectives.description: Pergi menuju pos penjagaan Cradle Outer Ring.
Kalahkan Cradle Fragment Beast yang lepas kendali.
Lumpuhkan Cradle Warden untuk mereset sistem keamanannya.

quests.title: Echoes in the Glass
quests.description: Fluktuasi Arcane terdeteksi di Fractured Glass Valley. Para petinggi Observatory Spire mengutusmu untuk mengekstraksi data mentah dari entitas di area tersebut.

objectives.description: Kumpulkan residu Arcane dari Glass Wisp.

quests.title: Iron March: Ravine Clearing
quests.description: Ravine Scrap Golem menghalangi rute logistik antara Bastion Core dan zona industri. Singkirkan ancaman ini dan tunjukkan kekuatan Iron Hegemony.

objectives.description: Musnahkan Ravine Scrap Golem yang memblokir rute.
Ambil Scrap Core sebagai bukti operasi.

quests.title: Securing the Smuggler's Route
quests.description: Binatang buas dan golem liar mengacaukan rute penyelundupan utama kita menuju Black Dock Market. Bersihkan jalur tersebut agar roda ekonomi Cartel tetap berjalan.

objectives.description: Hancurkan Contraband Golem yang lepas kendali.

quests.title: Asset Protection: Highland Sweep
quests.description: Malafungsi massal terjadi pada unit drone pengintai kita. Hancurkan unit yang rusak sebelum faksi lain mencuri paten teknologi OmniCorp.

quests.title: Purging the Shardroot
quests.description: Roh-roh gentayangan dan alam yang marah menolak Harmoni Shard. Tunjukkan pengabdianmu dengan menyucikan Shardroot Swamp dari jiwa-jiwa liar ini.

objectives.description: Kalahkan Shardroot Titan untuk membuktikan kelayakanmu.

quests.title: Trial of the Scorched Earth
quests.description: Kehormatan dibayar dengan darah, prajurit! Bertahanlah di iklim ekstrem Scorched Badlands dan kalahkan predator terkuatnya agar kau diakui secara penuh oleh Legion.

objectives.description: Kumpulkan Ember Fang sebagai piala perburuan.

quests.title: Weeding the Gardens
quests.description: Populasi Garden Mite dan Feral Rootling di Aethel Gardens sedang melonjak. Basmi hama ini sebelum mereka merusak ekosistem buatan di sekitar Nexus.

quests.title: Crystalline Resonance
quests.description: Para peneliti di Observatory membutuhkan sampel murni dari Crystal Wisp dan Shardling yang berkeliaran di Crystal Slope untuk eksperimen resonansi terbaru mereka.

quests.title: Scavenger Hunt
quests.description: Scrap Drone dan Rust Mite mengambil komponen berharga dari Scrap Field yang seharusnya masuk ke pabrik Bastion. Hancurkan mereka dan ambil kembali besi kita.

quests.title: Tidal Nuisance
quests.description: Coral Tidal Crab mulai menyerang pekerja tambang garam kita di pinggiran Wetlands. Singkirkan mereka agar operasi pemanenan kembali berjalan lancar.

objectives.description: Ambil Crab Shell untuk dijual di pasar gelap.

quests.title: Drone Recalibration
quests.description: Beberapa Plateau Drone mengalami kegagalan sensor dan berbalik menyerang karyawan. Hancurkan unit-unit cacat tersebut agar tidak merusak aset perusahaan lainnya.

objectives.description: Bawa kembali Circuit Fragment untuk daur ulang.

quests.title: Sacred Offerings
quests.description: Roh alam di Glowvine Forest sedang gelisah. Kumpulkan benih bercahaya dari Glowvine Sprite dan bagian kayu dari Forest Barkling sebagai persembahan untuk Altar.

objectives.description: Kumpulkan Bark Fragment dari Forest Barkling.

quests.title: Desert Survival Training
quests.description: Untuk menjadi bagian sejati dari Legion, kau harus membuktikan kemampuan bertahan hidup di padang pasir. Buru Sand Runner dan Dune Gnasher yang mengancam kamp kita.

quests.title: Harvesting the Expanse
quests.description: Aethel Behemoth berkeliaran di area PvP terbuka. Mengalahkan makhluk mengerikan ini akan memberikanmu reputasi besar di antara para mercenary.

objectives.description: Kalahkan Aethel Behemoth yang sangat kuat.

quests.title: Echoes of the Abyss
quests.description: Laporan anomali menunjukkan bahwa entitas Void Reaver merobek realita di dasar Chasm. Hentikan mereka sebelum Void menyebar ke area lain.

objectives.description: Tutup robekan realita dengan mengalahkan Void Reaver.
Bawa kembali Void Fragment untuk diteliti.

quests.title: Hunt the Ashen Terror
quests.description: Ashen Drake yang melegenda kembali terlihat di Shattered Heart. Kumpulkan rekan-rekanmu dan buktikan diri sebagai pemburu monster terkuat di Xylos.

quests.title: Welcome to Nexus Core
quests.description: Selamat datang di Xylos. Lapor ke terminal pendaftaran pusat di Nexus Core untuk mendapatkan identitas resmi dan persediaan awalmu.

objectives.description: Akses terminal pendaftaran untuk sinkronisasi DNA.

quests.title: Maintenance Tunnel Scraps
quests.description: Beberapa Rogue Drone penjaga mulai lepas kendali di sektor bawah Nexus Core. Hancurkan mereka dan kumpulkan Scrap Metal yang bisa dijual atau dirakit.

objectives.description: Kumpulkan Scrap Metal dari drone yang hancur.

quests.title: Storm Chaser's Bounty
quests.description: Area Aethel Storm Belt sangat berbahaya namun kaya akan mineral. Buktikan ketangguhanmu dengan mengumpulkan Storm Crystals di tengah badai.

objectives.description: Kalahkan Storm Elementals yang menjaga kristal.

quests.title: Securing the Expanse
quests.description: Cradle Expanse sedang diperebutkan. Kami butuh agen tangguh untuk menonaktifkan jammer musuh dan menumbangkan kapten mereka. Keberhasilanmu akan diganjar pusaka faksi.

objectives.description: Retas dan matikan Signal Jammer musuh.

quests.title: The Forge Awakens
quests.description: Pusat Prima Materia Forge telah bangkit. Energi murni yang mematikan mengalir tak terkendali. Kumpulkan skuad terbaikmu, hancurkan pylon energinya, dan kalahkan Forge Master.

objectives.description: Hancurkan 4 Forge Pylons untuk melemahkan perisai boss.
Kalahkan Raid Boss: Forge Master Ignis.

quests.title: Supply Audit
quests.description: Logistik Nexus mengalami ketidaksesuaian. Periksa beberapa terminal gudang dan pastikan data inventaris valid.

quests.title: Courier Duty
quests.description: Deliver a secured data package between Nexus departments.

objectives.description: Deliver the package to the data hub.

quests.title: Training Protocol
quests.description: All operatives must complete combat readiness drills before deployment.

quests.title: Wildlife Control
quests.description: Creatures in the Aethel Gardens are damaging fragile research flora.

quests.title: Aethel Sample Collection
quests.description: Researchers require samples of raw Aethel residue.

quests.title: Storm Residue Study
quests.description: A recent Aethel surge left unstable residue pockets across the garden perimeter.

quests.title: Scavenger Sweep
quests.description: Scavengers are looting abandoned Concordium infrastructure.

quests.title: Lost Equipment Recovery
quests.description: Retrieve equipment crates stolen during the collapse of the district.

quests.title: Urban Predator
quests.description: A dangerous alpha predator has taken control of the abandoned district.

quests.title: Outer Ring Patrol
quests.description: Conduct a patrol across the outer defensive perimeter.

quests.title: Cradle Defense Grid
quests.description: Repair malfunctioning defense pylons along the ring.

quests.title: Anomaly Suppression
quests.description: A powerful Aethel anomaly has manifested near the Cradle perimeter.

quests.title: Exclusion Zone Sweep
quests.description: The Inner Cradle Exclusion Zone has become increasingly unstable. Clear hostile entities threatening Concordium patrol routes.

quests.title: Core Instability Survey
quests.description: Strange gravitational distortions have been detected in the Inner Cradle. Investigate anomaly clusters.

quests.title: Guardian of the Inner Ring
quests.description: A powerful guardian creature has emerged from the Cradle interior. Destroy it before it destabilizes the region.

quests.title: Arcane Documentation
quests.description: The Arcanum archives require new field reports from nearby expeditions.

quests.title: Mana Calibration
quests.description: All Arcanum recruits must calibrate their Aethel resonance devices.

quests.title: Experimental Field Trial
quests.description: Test a prototype energy stimulator in controlled combat conditions.

quests.title: Crystal Specimen
quests.description: Collect crystal fragments for arcane resonance analysis.

quests.title: Slope Predators
quests.description: Predatory creatures are disrupting crystal harvesting operations.

quests.title: Resonance Disruption
quests.description: Investigate unstable resonance pulses echoing through the crystal formations.

quests.title: Glass Predator Hunt
quests.description: Strange predators roam the valley of shattered crystal.

quests.title: Shattered Research Data
quests.description: Recover lost research devices scattered during a resonance explosion.

quests.title: The Crystal Aberration
quests.description: A powerful mutated crystal entity has formed within the valley.

quests.title: Resonant Creatures
quests.description: Creatures exposed to Aethel resonance have become hostile.

quests.title: Echo Mapping
quests.description: Map resonance echoes within the cavern network.

quests.title: The Cavern Overmind
quests.description: A powerful resonance entity has formed at the deepest chamber.

quests.title: Shard Energy Survey
quests.description: Survey powerful Aethel pulse emissions radiating from the shard peaks.

quests.title: Shardborn Creatures
quests.description: Creatures infused with shard energy threaten research teams.

quests.title: The Shard Titan
quests.description: A colossal shard-infused titan has awakened.

quests.title: Forge Calibration
quests.description: Assist engineers in calibrating Bastion’s central forge.

quests.title: Combat Readiness
quests.description: All Hegemony soldiers must pass combat drills.

quests.title: Supply Convoy Escort
quests.description: Protect a convoy transporting refined ore.

quests.title: Scrap Scavengers
quests.description: Scavengers are stealing valuable scrap metal.

quests.title: Metal Recovery
quests.description: Collect usable metal fragments for Bastion foundries.

quests.title: The Scrap Titan
quests.description: A massive mechanical titan has awakened in the scrap fields.

quests.title: Ore Transport Security
quests.description: Protect ore transports moving from mining sites to the foundry.

quests.title: Furnace Stabilization
quests.description: Overheated furnaces threaten to melt critical foundry infrastructure.

quests.title: Industrial Saboteur
quests.description: Enemy agents are sabotaging foundry operations.

quests.title: Fortress Patrol
quests.description: Conduct patrols around the fortress perimeter.

quests.title: Defensive Grid Repair
quests.description: Repair damaged automated defense turrets.

quests.title: Bulwark Warlord
quests.description: A powerful warlord leads attacks on the fortress.

quests.title: Heat Resistant Materials
quests.description: Collect materials resistant to magma temperatures.

quests.title: Magma Beast Hunt
quests.description: Dangerous magma beasts threaten refinery workers.

quests.title: Molten Colossus
quests.description: A colossal molten entity has emerged from beneath the refinery.

quests.title: War Drill
quests.description: Participate in live fire siege drills.

quests.title: Weapon System Calibration
quests.description: Test newly developed artillery weapons.

quests.title: Prototype War Machine
quests.description: A rogue prototype war machine has escaped testing control.

quests.title: Dockside Inventory
quests.description: Meridian trade manifests must be verified before shipments depart.

quests.title: Courier for Profit
quests.description: Deliver a sealed package to a trading partner across the docks.

quests.title: Debt Collector
quests.description: A debtor has refused to pay his contract. Recover the debt by force if necessary.

quests.title: Merchant Caravan
quests.description: Escort a valuable merchant caravan through the trade nexus.

quests.title: Supply Interception
quests.description: Raiders are attempting to intercept Meridian supply shipments.

quests.title: Market Regulator
quests.description: A rival cartel leader has seized control of a trading hub.

quests.title: Illegal Shipment
quests.description: Deliver contraband goods discreetly to a buyer.

quests.title: Silence the Informant
quests.description: A spy is leaking cartel information.

quests.title: Underworld Sweep
quests.description: Clear rival smugglers from the district.

quests.title: Asteroid Salvage
quests.description: Salvage valuable materials from asteroid wreckage.

quests.title: Pirate Interception
quests.description: Pirates threaten Meridian smuggling routes.

quests.title: Asteroid Overlord
quests.description: A pirate warlord controls the asteroid sector.

quests.title: Corporate Data Audit
quests.description: OmniCorp's financial and resource data must be audited for discrepancies.

quests.title: Internal Security Sweep
quests.description: Internal security drones have malfunctioned inside the Spire.

quests.title: Corporate Espionage
quests.description: A rival faction spy infiltrated the Spire's lower systems.

quests.title: Resource Survey
quests.description: Survey resource deposits before mining operations begin.

quests.title: Extraction Security
quests.description: Hostile wildlife threatens mining operations.

quests.title: Extraction Overseer
quests.description: A mutated creature has taken control of a mining zone.

quests.title: Experimental Sample
quests.description: Collect biological samples for OmniCorp experiments.

quests.title: Containment Breach
quests.description: Experimental creatures escaped containment.

quests.title: Prototype Horror
quests.description: A powerful experimental organism has broken loose.

quests.title: Supply Drone Escort
quests.description: Protect supply drones transporting corporate cargo.

quests.title: Pirate Interdiction
quests.description: Space pirates are attacking OmniCorp shipping lanes.

quests.title: Fleet Destroyer
quests.description: A massive pirate flagship controls the orbital corridor.

quests.title: Cradle Resource Conflict
quests.description: Multiple factions battle for control of Prima Materia deposits.

objectives.description: Secure Prima Materia fragments while defending against other players.

quests.title: Territory Domination
quests.description: Capture control points within the expanse.

quests.title: Expanse Champion
quests.description: A massive anomaly guardian roams the battlefield.

quests.title: Frontline Assault
quests.description: Launch assaults against enemy faction forces.

quests.title: Siege Breaker
quests.description: Destroy enemy siege weapons before they breach defensive lines.

quests.title: Battlefield Warlord
quests.description: A feared warlord commands the battlefield forces.

quests.title: Storm Entity Purge
quests.description: Aethel storms spawn dangerous energy entities.

quests.title: Storm Anomaly Stabilization
quests.description: Stabilize unstable storm anomalies.

quests.title: Storm Titan Raid
quests.description: A massive storm titan has manifested inside the Aethel storm.

quests.title: Fragments of the Broken Core
quests.description: Fragments of a shattered Aethel core are scattered across the region.

quests.title: Corrupted Guardians
quests.description: Ancient guardians corrupted by Aethel energy now roam the heart.

quests.title: Heartbreaker Titan
quests.description: A massive titan born from the shattered core threatens the region.

quests.title: Faultline Survey
quests.description: Massive energy rifts have opened along the faultline.

quests.title: Rift Spawn Purge
quests.description: Creatures emerge from the rift anomalies.

quests.title: Abyss Harbinger
quests.description: A powerful abyssal entity emerges from the deepest rift.

quests.title: Forge Stabilization
quests.description: The forge channels immense Prima Materia energy.

quests.title: Forge Defenders
quests.description: Hostile constructs threaten the forge complex.

quests.title: Gravity Titan Assault
quests.description: A titanic entity manipulates gravitational fields around the forge.

quests.title: Siphon Calibration
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon requires constant calibration.

quests.title: Aethel Instability
quests.description: Unstable energy entities emerge from the siphon.

quests.title: Ashen Drake Cataclysm
quests.description: The legendary Ashen Drake descends upon the siphon.

quests.title: Strategic Uplink Assault
quests.description: Prove yourself.

quests.title: Strategic Uplink Assault - Arcanum Seekers
quests.description: Prove yourself.

quests.title: Strategic Uplink Assault - Iron Hegemony
quests.description: Prove yourself.

quests.title: Strategic Uplink Assault - Meridian Cartel
quests.description: Prove yourself.

quests.title: Strategic Uplink Assault - Omnicorp
quests.description: Prove yourself.

quests.title: Strategic Uplink Assault - Children Of The Shard
quests.description: Prove yourself.

quests.title: Strategic Uplink Assault - Starforged Legion
quests.description: Prove yourself.

quests.title: Strategic Uplink Assault - Galactic Custodians
quests.description: The Custodians require proof of your tactical competence before granting class advancement. Report to the designated zone, neutralize all hostile targets, and return with a full operational report.

objectives.description: Eliminate rogue entities in the test zone.

quests.title: Strategic Uplink Assault - Freelance Contract
quests.description: Old Veteran Korr has a contract nobody else wants. Clear out the hostiles, bring back proof, and he'll get you that class upgrade. No questions asked.

quests.title: First Patrol
quests.description: Clear the Aethel Gardens of invasive critters damaging perimeter sensors.

quests.title: Signal Recovery
quests.description: Reactivate three signal beacons that went dark overnight.

quests.title: Scavenger Threat
quests.description: Scavengers raiding supply caches in the Civil Quarter. Eliminate the threat.

quests.title: Drone Decommission
quests.description: Malfunctioning patrol drones attacking civilians. Shut them down.

quests.title: Crystal Survey
quests.description: Collect resonance crystal samples for Arcanum analysis.

quests.title: Shardling Containment
quests.description: Shardlings absorbing uncontrolled crystal energy threaten the Slope.

quests.title: Glass Valley Anomaly
quests.description: Unusual resonance spikes in Fractured Glass Valley. Scout the source.

quests.title: Scrap Collection
quests.description: Gather scrap metal for Hegemony forges.

quests.title: Hound Problem
quests.description: Scrap Hounds interfering with salvage operations.

quests.title: Ravine Reclamation
quests.description: Reclaim the Iron Ravine mining corridor from Ravine Brutes.

quests.title: Net Mending
quests.description: Coral creatures have torn wetland nets. Clear area and recover salvage.

quests.title: Tidal Threat
quests.description: Tidal Crabs harassing dockworkers. Thin them.

quests.title: Jungle Supply Run
quests.description: Deliver a sealed crate to the Cartel's jungle cache point.

quests.title: Plateau Patrol
quests.description: OmniCorp sensors offline — eliminate wildlife interference.

quests.title: Data Recovery
quests.description: Recover data chips from decommissioned mining drones.

quests.title: Forest Cleansing
quests.description: Corrupted sprites threaten the sacred Glowvines.

quests.title: Shard Offering
quests.description: Collect shard fragments as offerings for the Heartwood Altar.

quests.title: Dune Patrol
quests.description: Dune Scavengers raiding Legion supply lines.

quests.title: Desert Extraction
quests.description: Gather Dune Sandstone for Legion fortification.

quests.title: Cradle Incursion
quests.description: Cradle anomaly beasts breaching the outer perimeter.

quests.title: Observatory Intelligence
quests.description: Arcanum activity near Cradle anomalies. Investigate.

quests.title: Cavern Delve
quests.description: Map the deep sections of the Resonance Caverns.

quests.title: Golem Suppression
quests.description: Resonance Golems have become dangerously unstable.

quests.title: Graveyard Salvage
quests.description: Recover war machine components before rival scavengers claim them.

quests.title: Sentinel Protocol
quests.description: War Machine Sentinels reactivated on hostile protocols. Shut them down.

quests.title: Black Dock Clearout
quests.description: Rival crew infiltrated the Black Dock. Remove them professionally.

quests.title: Grid Suppression
quests.description: Hostile drones breached the Secure Mining Grid.

quests.title: Shrine Purification
quests.description: Void energy corrupting the Fragment Shrine. Cleanse three nodes.

quests.title: Warpath Assault
quests.description: Enemy forces hold the Mesa Warpath. Dislodge them.

quests.title: Expanse Dominance
quests.description: Prove yourself in the contested Cradle Expanse.

quests.title: Border Conflict
quests.description: Fight for control of the Border Skirmish Ring.

quests.title: Cradle Exclusion Push
quests.description: Hold the advance corridor into the Inner Cradle Exclusion Zone.

quests.title: Peak Reckoning
quests.description: Hunt the Shard Pulse Tyrant disrupting the resonance network.

quests.title: Titan Integration
quests.description: A rogue Titan Proto Core corrupted the Assembly Yard. Neutralise it.

quests.title: Sunken Ruin Raid
quests.description: The Leviathan in the Sunken Aethel Ruin has been attacking Cartel dive teams.

quests.title: Reactor Override
quests.description: The Skybridge Reactor has been sabotaged. Eliminate hostile units and restore stability.

quests.title: Altar Consecration
quests.description: A corrupted entity desecrated the Heartwood Altar. Purge it.

quests.title: Canyon Conquest
quests.description: Seize the Forge Canyon Depths from entrenched enemy forces.

quests.title: Expanse Suppression
quests.description: Void-tainted creatures from the Expanse spreading corruption toward Concordium territories.

quests.title: Storm Belt Research
quests.description: The Aethel Storm Belt holds answers to the Void incursion.

quests.title: Void Incursion Response
quests.description: Void entities breached Hegemony territory via the Storm Belt. Repel them.

quests.title: Hidden City Salvage
quests.description: Extract treasures from the legendary Aethelgardian City.

quests.title: Void Echo Extraction
quests.description: OmniCorp detected a massive energy signature in the Void Echo Chasm.

quests.title: Shard Communion
quests.description: The Hidden City holds a fragment of the original Aethel Shard. Retrieve it.

quests.title: Kaelen Conquest Seal
quests.description: The ultimate trial — conquer the Void Echo Chasm and claim the Kaelen Conquest Seal.

quests.title: Severance Protocol
quests.description: Severance Faultline entities threaten zone collapse. Immediate suppression ordered.

quests.title: Siphon Collapse
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is failing. Suppress void entities and buy time for engineers.

quests.title: The Prima Forge
quests.description: Clear the Prima Materia Forge for the artificers.

quests.title: Void Echo Hunt
quests.description: Regular suppression now required in the Void Echo Chasm.

quests.title: Shattered Heart Reckoning
quests.description: Purge the Drake Minions and confront what lurks at the Shattered Heart's core.

quests.title: Eternal Siege
quests.description: Hold the Prima Materia Forge against the Void tide.

quests.title: The Last Severance
quests.description: The Faultline is widening. Final push to collapse the Void entry point permanently.

quests.title: Void Sovereign
quests.description: Something vast stirs in the deepest Void Echo Chasm. The Sovereign must not emerge.

quests.title: Eternal Guardian
quests.description: The Ashen Drake has returned. Only those who have faced the Void may challenge it.

quests.title: Daily: Void Suppression
quests.description: Daily contract: suppress Void entities in the Cradle Expanse.

quests.title: Daily: Storm Belt Patrol
quests.description: Daily patrol contract for the Aethel Storm Belt.

quests.title: Daily: Pinnacle Hunt
quests.description: Daily elite hunt in the Prima Materia Forge.

quests.title: Arrival at Nexus
quests.description: You arrive in Nexus, the capital built around the Aethel Cradle. Officer Valen orders you to register as a Concordium operative and prove your worth in the surrounding districts.

quests.title: Stabilizing the Gardens
quests.description: Aethel mutations have begun appearing in the Gardens. Scout Rian requests assistance in clearing hostile creatures threatening the supply routes to Nexus.

objectives.description: Eliminate mutated creatures in the Gardens.

quests.title: Aethel Fragment Survey
quests.description: Concordium researchers need raw Aethel fragments for analysis. Collect fragments from unstable nodes before hostile creatures corrupt them.

quests.title: The Broken Quarter
quests.description: The ruins of the Broken Civil Quarter have become infested with scavengers and rogue constructs. Clear the area to reopen trade routes.

quests.title: Echoes of the Past
quests.description: Old Man Kael believes fragments of Aethelgardian technology remain hidden in the ruins. Recover these artifacts for Concordium study.

quests.title: Securing the Outer Ring
quests.description: Energy fluctuations threaten the Aethel Cradle. Overseer Vael orders the elimination of hostile entities near the Cradle perimeter.

quests.title: First Signs of the Severance
quests.description: Data recovered from the Outer Ring suggests deeper instability within the Aethel Cradle. Concordium command prepares an expedition into restricted zones.

quests.title: Initiation of Inquiry
quests.description: The Arcanum Seekers welcome new operatives willing to pursue knowledge without limits. Report to the Observatory Spire and undergo your first research assignment.

quests.title: Crystal Resonance Study
quests.description: Energy signatures detected within the crystal slopes indicate unusual Aethel resonance. Gather samples and eliminate hostile entities interfering with the research.

quests.title: Data From the Shard
quests.description: Fragments of Aethel crystals contain encoded energy patterns. Collect samples so the Arcanum Seekers can decode their hidden structure.

quests.title: Echoes in the Glass
quests.description: Strange arcane echoes emanate from the fractured glass formations. Archivist Sylas believes they may be remnants of Aethelgardian technology.

quests.title: Forbidden Calculations
quests.description: The resonance patterns reveal calculations linked to ancient Aethelgardian devices. The Seekers order deeper investigation despite potential risks.

quests.title: The Resonance Caverns
quests.description: Powerful energy waves echo through the caverns beneath the mountains. Investigate the anomalies and eliminate the hostile entities guarding them.

quests.title: Secrets Beneath the Caverns
quests.description: Deep within the caverns lies a structure older than the Arcanum Seekers expected. The ruins may contain knowledge of the ancient Aethelgard civilization.

quests.title: Forged in Bastion
quests.description: The Iron Hegemony wastes no time with ceremony. New recruits are immediately placed into service to strengthen the war machine of Bastion.

objectives.description: Register as an Iron Hegemony soldier.

quests.title: Scrap Field Clearance
quests.description: The scrap fields outside Bastion are filled with rogue machines and scavengers. Clear them so industrial operations can continue.

quests.title: Salvage for the War Machine
quests.description: Every piece of scrap can be turned into war material. Gather salvage components to fuel the Bastion foundries.

quests.title: Iron Ravine Offensive
quests.description: The Iron Ravine contains valuable mineral deposits needed for the Hegemony's industry. Secure the region from hostile creatures.

quests.title: Industrial Expansion
quests.description: With the ravine secured, the Hegemony begins construction of new extraction platforms. Protect engineers from hostile forces.

quests.title: War Machine Graveyard
quests.description: Old battle machines lie dormant in the graveyard. Recover usable components and eliminate malfunctioning war constructs.

quests.title: Birth of the War Engine
quests.description: Recovered technology from ancient battle machines may give the Hegemony a decisive advantage. Commander Kael orders the construction of a prototype war engine.

quests.title: Welcome to Port Meridian
quests.description: Port Meridian thrives on trade, secrets, and influence. Broker Jax offers you your first opportunity to work for the Cartel.

quests.title: Wetland Smuggling Route
quests.description: Cartel supply lines through the Coral Wetlands have been disrupted by hostile wildlife. Clear the path so smugglers can operate again.

objectives.description: Eliminate predators blocking the smuggling route.

quests.title: Hidden Cargo
quests.description: Retrieve a shipment of contraband hidden in the wetlands before Concordium patrols find it.

quests.title: Jungle Influence
quests.description: The Cartel must secure control over the Smuggler Jungle trade routes. Remove hostile creatures and establish dominance.

quests.title: Black Dock Deal
quests.description: A secret trade deal must be secured in the Black Dock Market. Protect the transaction from rival factions.

quests.title: Corporate Assignment
quests.description: OmniCorp employees are expected to deliver results. Report to the executive office to receive your first assignment.

quests.title: Survey the Highlands
quests.description: OmniCorp surveyors have detected Prima Materia deposits. Clear hostile creatures so mining operations can begin.

quests.title: Extraction Authorization
quests.description: Collect energy samples from the plateau to verify extraction viability.

quests.title: Extraction Zone Delta
quests.description: OmniCorp mining operations are under threat. Eliminate hostile forces interfering with extraction equipment.

quests.title: Secure Mining Grid
quests.description: The secure mining grid must be stabilized before large-scale extraction can begin.

quests.title: Whispers of the Shard
quests.description: The High Priest senses the Shard calling to you. You must prove your devotion before the cult will trust you.

objectives.description: Offer a prayer at the sacred altar.

quests.title: Forest Purification
quests.description: Creatures corrupted by technological interference roam the forest. Purify them in the name of the Shard.

quests.title: Gather Sacred Fragments
quests.description: Fragments of the divine Shard lie scattered in the forest. Collect them for ritual use.

quests.title: Swamp of Revelation
quests.description: The Shard speaks strongest in the swamp. Investigate the energy surges and purge intruders.

quests.title: The Fragment Shrine
quests.description: An ancient shrine resonates with Aethel power. Perform the sacred ritual to awaken its true energy.

quests.title: Warrior's Oath
quests.description: The Starforged Legion demands strength and honor. Prove your worth before the Legion General.

quests.title: Dune Outskirts Hunt
quests.description: The dunes beyond the fortress hold dangerous predators. Slay them to prove your combat ability.

quests.title: Survivor of the Badlands
quests.description: The badlands test the endurance of every warrior. Survive the trials and bring back proof of your victories.

quests.title: Path of War
quests.description: The Legion marches across the mesa warpath. Clear the path for the next campaign.

quests.title: Forge Canyon Trial
quests.description: Only the strongest warriors survive the depths of Forge Canyon. Return victorious to earn the Legion's respect.

quests.title: Expedition into the Expanse
quests.description: The Concordium launches an expedition into the unstable Cradle Expanse to secure Aethel research sites.

quests.title: Aethel Survey Operation
quests.description: Stabilize sensor towers across the battlefield to map the unstable Aethel currents.

quests.title: The Expanse Conflict
quests.description: Rival factions have begun fighting for control of the Expanse. Defend Concordium operations.

quests.title: Signal From the Peak
quests.description: A powerful Aethel resonance has been detected at the mountain peak.

quests.title: Ancient Resonance Device
quests.description: Recover an ancient Aethelgardian device discovered beneath the peak.

quests.title: Forbidden Experiment
quests.description: Conduct a dangerous experiment using the recovered Aethel device.

quests.title: Titan Assembly Directive
quests.description: The Hegemony begins construction of massive war machines known as Titans.

quests.title: Industrial Security
quests.description: Rival factions attempt sabotage. Defend the Titan assembly lines.

quests.title: Titan Awakening
quests.description: The first Titan prototype is activated.

quests.title: Storm Belt Deployment
quests.description: Violent Aethel storms rage across the belt. Concordium forces deploy to stabilize research installations.

quests.title: Contain the Storm
quests.description: Activate storm stabilizers to prevent catastrophic Aethel energy eruptions.

quests.title: Storm Data Collection
quests.description: The Arcanum Seekers view the storms as a source of limitless knowledge.

quests.title: Unstable Experiment
quests.description: A dangerous experiment attempts to harness the energy of the Severance Faultline.

quests.title: Titan War Deployment
quests.description: The Iron Hegemony deploys Titans to dominate the battlefield.

quests.title: Dominion of Steel
quests.description: Destroy enemy resistance to establish Hegemony control over the Faultline.

quests.title: Forge Investigation
quests.description: The Concordium investigates the massive Prima Materia Forge, a site capable of reshaping Aethel energy.

quests.title: The Shattered Heart
quests.description: Reality fractures within the Shattered Heart. The Concordium must investigate before the anomaly spreads.

quests.title: Forge Resonance Study
quests.description: The Arcanum Seekers believe the Forge may unlock the secrets of the ancient Aethelgard civilization.

quests.title: Echoes of Aethelgard
quests.description: Ancient signals from the lost Aethelgard civilization echo within the Shattered Heart.

quests.title: Forge Conquest
quests.description: The Hegemony seeks to control the Forge to power its Titan armies.

quests.title: Titan Ascension
quests.description: The Hegemony deploys advanced Titans to conquer the Shattered Heart.

quests.title: March to the Siphon
quests.description: The Concordium launches a final campaign to secure the Aethel Siphon and restore planetary stability.

quests.title: Stabilize the Siphon
quests.description: The Concordium attempts to stabilize the Siphon and restore order to Xylos.

quests.title: Secrets of the Siphon
quests.description: The Arcanum Seekers believe the Siphon contains the final knowledge of the Aethelgard civilization.

quests.title: Ascension Protocol
quests.description: The Arcanum Seekers attempt to unlock the ultimate Aethel energy.

quests.title: Final War Directive
quests.description: The Iron Hegemony launches a full assault to seize the Siphon.

quests.title: Dominion of the Siphon
quests.description: The Hegemony attempts to seize absolute control of the Siphon.
